description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the clojure:lein-2.8.1 Docker image. Define two stages: test and build, and a global before_script that runs lein deps. In the test stage add a testar job that executes lein test. In the build stage add a compilar job that runs lein uberjar, then stores the resulting JAR files from target/uberjar/*.jar as an artifact named $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
